summary: The diff implements fixes for BGM playback (useBGM.ts), click/tap sounds (useClickSound.ts synthesized via Web Audio API, useDoubleKnockSound.ts via audio pool), page-specific sounds (ChatPage.tsx, LockScreen.tsx, OurMemoriesPage.tsx), and references audio files in public assets. Most requirements are addressed, but REQ-3's audit of physical file existence cannot be confirmed from the diff alone since no audio files were added to the repository and the diff shows no ADDED FILES.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure every referenced audio file exists in the correct public assets directory. If a file is missing, it is either added to public assets or replaced with a Web Audio API synthesized equivalent.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows 0 added files. Audio files referenced in hooks and pages (/assets/Dreamy.mp3.m4a, /assets/Double Knock.mp3.m4a, /assets/Hello.mp3.m4a, /assets/Blip Bleep.mp3.m4a) are not confirmed to exist in the public assets directory. No new audio files were added, and useDoubleKnockSound.ts still relies on /assets/Double Knock.mp3.m4a existing as a physical file rather than synthesizing it.

hallucinated_features.description: DashboardPage plays a separate Blip Bleep.mp3.m4a sound when the Doraemon hero image is clicked via a handleDoraemonClick function.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention adding a click sound specifically to the Doraemon hero image on the Dashboard page. This is an additional interaction not specified in any requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: OurMemoriesPage slices ALL_PHOTOS to remove first and last photos, changing the displayed photo set.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request is exclusively about fixing audio playback. Modifying which photos are displayed on OurMemoriesPage is not part of any stated requirement.
